creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
/compat/linux/usr/X11R6/lib/libGL.so.1 installed by graphics/linux_dri
	is overwritten by installation of x11/nvidia-driver.

Fix: 

I do not know how to manage this problem.
	graphics/linux_dri is required by math/mupad.
	and I use nVidia video card.
	only about my host, linux_dri can be removed as reading Dependency
	in the Makefile of mupad.  but the confliction might occur by other ports.
How-To-Repeat: 	install one after installation of the another.
